data.title: Katz's Deli partners with Square to modernize operations & enable nationwide growth. Established in 1888, the iconic deli aims to preserve its authentic vibe.
data.description: In New York City, Square has partnered with Katz's Delicatessen, a renowned Jewish deli in the Lower East Side since 1888. This collaboration will see Square's commerce platform being implemented to enhance Katz's operations. The iconic deli aims to expand its reach with nationwide delivery services, all while maintaining the traditional charm that has solidified its status as a culinary icon and beloved local spot for 100+ years. Katz's, known for its expertly cured and carved meats, looks to modernize its services through this venture.

data.title: Facet expands memberships to include tax filing, solidifying status as all-in-one financial hub.
data.description: In Baltimore, a leading FinTech company called Facet has just launched a new offering in their flat-fee membership plans. The company now includes tax preparation and filing services as part of their comprehensive financial planning memberships. This expansion highlights Facet's dedication to being the exclusive financial partner for its members, providing a range of services including financial planning, estate planning, advanced investing options such as direct indexing and alternatives, and now, integrated tax services. This move aims to solidify Facet's position as a one-stop financial solution for its members.

data.title: Onapsis introduces new SAP security updates, includes SAP Notes Command Center, Rapid Controls for Dangerous Exploits, Alert on Anything for BTP.
data.description: In Boston today, Onapsis unveiled significant updates to its Onapsis Platform, introducing three new features: the SAP Notes Command Center, Rapid Controls for Dangerous Exploits, and Alert on Anything for SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). These additions provide organizations with enhanced SAP cybersecurity and compliance measures. The SAP Notes Command Center, Rapid Controls for Dangerous Exploits, and Alert on Anything for BTP equip businesses with improved insights, increased visibility, and automation to bolster their SAP application security. This development signifies a notable advancement in safeguarding SAP systems.

data.title: Motorola Solutions debuts 'Inform' at GSX 2025, assisting security operators with AI-enabled solutions, unifying Avigilon data and third-party deployments.
data.description: Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) is introducing AI-assisted incident response solutions at GSX 2025 in New Orleans from Sept. 29 to Oct. 1. These solutions are designed to help security operators manage numerous cameras, doors, sensors, and other security deployments more efficiently across on-premise, cloud-based, and third-party platforms. Inform, the first phase of unifying the Avigilon open-architecture security suite, consolidates data from Avigilon and various third-party solutions. This development aims to streamline security management processes and enhance operational effectiveness.

data.title: Ostro launches unified digital experience with AI tools for life sciences, improving provider & patient engagement.
data.description: Miami-based Ostro has unveiled an upgraded digital platform for its leading engagement tools, Tailor and Navigate, catered towards the life sciences sector. Ostro is known for its innovative AI technology, specifically designed for healthcare providers and patients. The new unified digital experience integrates Ostro's conversational AI chat tool and advanced search function to provide faster access to trustworthy medical information. This updated platform aims to streamline the process for HCPs and patients, ensuring they can easily retrieve relevant information.

data.title: Acumatica partners with PRCA and NFR as their Official ERP Software for a multi-year deal. #CloudSolutions #BusinessManagement
data.description: Based in Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica, a prominent provider of cloud-based business management solutions, has recently revealed a new multi-year partnership with the Professional Rodeo Cowboys Association (PRCA), the primary professional rodeo-sanctioning body globally. This partnership designates Acumatica as the Official ERP Software and Official Partner of the PRCA and the National Finals Rodeo (NFR). The alliance highlights Acumatica's position as the dedicated provider of business management technology for the rodeo industry.

data.title: O.C. Tanner releases three new recognition tools to deepen engagement & visibility. Post a Win, Boost, and Leader Broadcast aim to amplify employee accomplishments.
data.description: The Culture Cloud® platform, provided by O.C. Tanner, a prominent company in strategic employee recognition and rewards, has introduced three new features: Post a Win, Boost, and Leader Broadcast. These additions aim to enhance engagement, amplify recognition instances, and increase visibility of employee achievements within organizations. O.C. Tanner emphasizes that recognition should be more than just sporadic gratitude, but instead a practice that nurtures continual, substantial connections among employees.

data.title: Bospar's new tool, Audit*E, corrects brand misrepresentation on AI platforms, improving visibility.
data.description: In San Francisco, a new tool called Audit*E by Bospar is making waves as the first of its kind to reveal how companies are represented on key AI platforms. This innovative tool not only highlights their presence across these platforms but also offers a strategic roadmap to enhance and rectify their AI results.

data.title: Cloudflare introduces NET Dollar, U.S. dollar-backed stablecoin for agentic web transactions.
data.description: A new stablecoin called NET Dollar will be introduced by Cloudflare in San Francisco. This U.S. dollar-backed digital currency aims to facilitate instant and secure transactions for the agentic web. This initiative by Cloudflare is meant to enhance the efficiency and security of online transactions.

data.title: Pluto Health broadens access through major payors including Medicare, Medicaid, UnitedHealthcare, Aetna, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Ambetter, and Cigna in select states. Making care more equitable and affordable nationwide.
data.description: In Durham, North Carolina, Pluto Health, a prominent provider of AI-driven healthcare services, revealed that its tailored care approach is now accessible to patients with various insurance plans. This includes Medicare, Medicaid, and major commercial providers like UnitedHealthcare, Aetna, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Ambetter, and Cigna in specific states. By broadening its coverage to these plans, Pluto Health aims to offer fair, cost-effective, and top-notch care across the country.

data.title: ROC has been ranked as the top American facial recognition provider in NIST FRTE, achieving top global marks for accuracy and speed.
data.description: In Denver on September 25, 2025, ROC, a US-based company specializing in multimodal biometrics and Vision AI, unveiled their newest face recognition algorithm which has been recognized as one of the most precise and reliable globally. This recognition comes from the recent NIST Face Recognition Vendor Test (FRTE). The algorithm's outstanding accuracy and consistency in the test solidify ROC's position as a top player in the field of biometrics and AI technology.

data.title: Urban Air Adventure Park to expand in California with 5 new franchise agreements, planning to add 7 parks in the state.
data.description: A renowned operator of indoor adventure parks, Urban Air Adventure Park, is set to expand its presence in California by adding seven new parks. The company, known as the world's largest indoor adventure park operator and a key player in the youth enrichment sector, is aiming to further grow its footprint in the state. This development signifies a significant investment in the region and underscores Urban Air Adventure Park’s commitment to providing thrilling and engaging experiences for visitors. The expansion in California reflects the company's strategic approach to catering to the ever-growing demand for recreational activities, with the potential to attract a large number of adventure enthusiasts.

data.title: NYSE provides daily pre-market update; President of South Korea rings Opening Bell. Ashley Mastronardi delivers update.
data.description: Today in New York on September 25, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) shared its daily pre-market report from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can now access the latest NYSE Pre-market update for valuable market insights before the trading day commences. Ashley Mastronardi is responsible for delivering this crucial pre-market update, making it an essential resource for investors looking to stay ahead in the market.

data.title: Venture Valley Business Tycoon named "Best of Back to School 2025" for Secondary Education by Tech & Learning Awards. Game is CODiE Awards Finalist for "Best Educational Game" in categories for grades 9-12.
data.description: Venture Valley, developed by Singleton Foundation for Financial Literacy and Entrepreneurship, has been selected as a finalist for the "Best Educational Game" category in the prestigious CODiE Awards. The game is available for free on PC through Steam and on mobile devices running iOS. This recognition comes as a testament to the success of Venture Valley in providing educational value to players. The awards ceremony will take place in Pasadena, California on September 25, 2025.

data.title: Club Pilates holds largest 80s Week Event across the US & Canada, inviting community to celebrate from Sept 25 to Oct 10.
data.description: In Irvine, California, Club Pilates studios nationwide are gearing up for their annual 80s Week Event in September. This year, the celebration will be bigger than ever, with participants from the U.S. and Canada joining in. The event, running from September 25th to October 10th, will feature neon lights and high-energy music, creating the largest Pilates throwback celebration yet. Members, instructors, and Pilates fans can join in the festivities at locations across both countries.

data.title: Global digital surgery devices market is projected to reach $12.13 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 15.3% till 2029. Leading companies hold 83.9% market share.
data.description: A new report titled "Digital Surgery Devices Market, Global, 2024-2029" is now available for purchase on ResearchAndMarkets.com. According to the report, the revenue forecast for the base year 2024 stands at $12.13 billion, and a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.3% is expected during the period from 2024 to 2029. The market for digital surgery devices includes advanced technologies like artificial intelligence (AI), robotic-assisted systems, augmented reality (AR), virtual reality (VR), and intraoperative imaging, aiming to revolutionize the field.
